title: World Cup Planning: Slide Deck And Recordings

communications.subject: Washington Public Records Act Request: World Cup Planning: Slide Deck And Recordings
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Washington Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

On March 15, this recording of a presentation alleged to be given by Washington Emergency Management Division employee Caroline Byrd in her official capacity was posted to social media: https://www.instagram.com/stopsurveillancecity/reel/DV6k4SUD4v2/

Please provide all slide decks and recordings for this presentation.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Rose Terse

communications.subject: Public Records Request :: P001870-031526
communications.communication:
Dear Rose Terse: 
Thank you for your interest in the public records of the Washington State Military Department. Your request has been received and is being processed in accordance with the State of Washington Public Records Act, Chapter 42.56 RCW. Your request was received in this office on 3/15/2026 and given the reference number P001870-031526 for tracking purposes. 
We are currently in the process of researching the documents potentially responsive to your request. You may expect an Installment or update regarding the status of your request within 2 weeks of this submittal.  PLEASE NOTE: The State of Washington Public Records Act, Chapter 42.56 RCW, does not require a governmental body to create new information, do legal research, or answer questions. 
You can monitor the progress of your request in "My Request Center".  You'll receive an email when your request has been completed. (https://u8387778.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.VEsWrlMiJDg0mXafq1mEXbfQjGqTJNI-2FBWmI65t6Pvcr3eGRsw0M-2Ft-2FM7QJD3YImufVVEpPlZ2lYInxsB-2BtgqnxMF7t9BPtXUcWcgH6Md38-3DKfc2_XIZcjXR7ehnL9Bx70gAwDAaJpZL6b5QHd-2FJgolY6Md81gkxD-2BjkDO6FsVx8UW8W7uWAenSdoybuE-2BG7WViRdcbOfakiXHdSL-2BSn61-2F1dVDVhMcmf7xmiCdET2k9oqTUPKFxyuMf04JC8goMUXDOuuLQWhgp6L9SgrH-2F3UFYGuB40QsXtMw3kzb9L-2FAGlpaEIKuTsie75jhaEogK6m-2FfTh3vnbktoJW8x1aV0mgsfdUBrY0c1-2FDWZ7rQahX4dUEOwqAI5f5IoL3P3C6C9BLcIpMKMHfUHYdXpLFFko2qJmbWQgOg2IM58EU41hnQbcvTCr6C3hZpnIojq7eo-2BRuVIzlVHkjTSbDjZomRUTbN3J3Ap-2F1kiEuXqK1lTG5d7kvRe)
